# Chris0x88 // Systems Architect Console

Systems architect with 20 years across engineering, energy markets, and trading. Specialized in autonomous agent systems and operational software for real-world decisions.

## Strategic Thesis: War on Middleware
The next era of software is owned, not rented. Blockchains and hashgraphs handle settlement and consensus. Edge compute handles execution. The user holds the keys. 

## Primary Stack
- **Languages**: Python, TypeScript, Bash
- **AI/Agents**: Claude Code, OpenClaw, LangGraph
- **Networks**: Hedera, Hyperliquid, SaucerSwap
- **Backend**: FastAPI, SQLite, Postgres, Redis
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Self-hosted, Edge compute

## Active Operational Modules (Projects)

### claude-cli-auth
Authentication tooling for the Claude Code ecosystem. Purpose-built for Claude Code workflows.
- Link: https://github.com/Chris0x88/claude-cli-auth

### BTC Rebalancer
Automated BTC/USDC rebalancing robot built on Hedera and SaucerSwap. Simple, honest, running in production.
- Link: https://github.com/Chris0x88/btc-rebalancer

### AusFuelWatch
Real-time maritime supply chain tracking for Australian fuel security. Autonomous data pipelines for industrial logistics.
- Link: https://github.com/Chris0x88/AUS_FUEL_WATCH

### SaucerSwap Python SDK
Production Python SDK for Hedera DeFi via SaucerSwap V2.
- Link: https://github.com/Chris0x88/saucerswap-python-sdk
